message:
feat(wa): add prepare/commit workflow for action plan previews

Implements a two-phase action execution model where plans can be prepared
(previewed) before committing, enabling safer and more auditable terminal
automation with explicit approval flows.

## Storage Layer (wa-core/storage.rs)

New schema (migration v11):
- `prepared_plans` table for storing plan previews awaiting commit
- Content-addressed plan_id based on action parameters
- Expiration and consumption tracking for plan validity
- Indexes on plan_hash, workspace_id, and expires_at for efficient queries

New types:
- `PreparedPlanRecord` for plan preview persistence
- `WriteCommand::InsertPreparedPlan` and `ConsumePreparedPlan` variants

New async methods on `StorageHandle`:
- `insert_prepared_plan()`: Store a plan preview for later commit
- `consume_prepared_plan()`: Atomically consume a valid, unexpired plan
- `get_prepared_plan()`: Query a plan by ID

The consume operation uses a transaction to ensure atomic read-update
semantics, preventing double-commit of the same plan.

## CLI Layer (wa/main.rs)

New commands:
- `wa prepare send --pane-id <id> "<text>"`: Prepare a send_text plan
- `wa prepare workflow run <name> --pane-id <id>`: Prepare a workflow plan
- `wa commit <plan_id> [--text <text>] [--approval-code <code>]`: Execute

New types:
- `PrepareCommands` enum for prepare subcommands
- `PrepareWorkflowCommands` for workflow-specific prepare operations
- `PreparedPlanParams` for serializing action parameters

This enables:
- Plan preview before execution for review
- Approval integration for high-risk actions
- Audit trail of prepared vs committed actions
- Timeout-based expiration for abandoned plans

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -448,6 +448,44 @@ SEE ALSO:
         timeout: u64,
     },
 
+    /// Prepare an action plan preview for commit
+    #[command(after_help = r#"EXAMPLES:
+    wa prepare send --pane-id 3 "ls"
+    wa prepare workflow run handle_compaction --pane-id 3
+
+SEE ALSO:
+    wa commit     Execute a prepared plan
+    wa approve    Approve denied actions"#)]
+    Prepare {
+        #[command(subcommand)]
+        command: PrepareCommands,
+    },
+
+    /// Commit a previously prepared plan
+    #[command(after_help = r#"EXAMPLES:
+    wa commit plan:abcd1234 --text "ls"
+    wa commit plan:abcd1234 --approval-code ABC12345 --text "rm -rf /tmp/test"
+
+SEE ALSO:
+    wa prepare    Prepare plan preview
+    wa approve    Approve denied actions"#)]
+    Commit {
+        /// Plan ID (from wa prepare)
+        plan_id: String,
+
+        /// Action text (required for send_text plans)
+        #[arg(long)]
+        text: Option<String>,
+
+        /// Read action text from a file (required for send_text plans)
+        #[arg(long)]
+        text_file: Option<PathBuf>,
+
+        /// Approval code to consume during commit (if required)
+        #[arg(long)]
+        approval_code: Option<String>,
+    },
+
     /// Submit an approval code for a pending action
     #[command(after_help = r#"EXAMPLES:
     wa approve AB12CD34              Submit an approval code
@@ -1283,6 +1321,58 @@ enum WorkflowCommands {
     },
 }
 
+#[derive(Subcommand)]
+enum PrepareCommands {
+    /// Prepare a send_text plan preview
+    Send {
+        /// Target pane ID
+        #[arg(long, alias = "pane")]
+        pane_id: u64,
+
+        /// Text to send
+        text: String,
+
+        /// Send character by character (no paste mode)
+        #[arg(long)]
+        no_paste: bool,
+
+        /// Do not append a trailing newline
+        #[arg(long)]
+        no_newline: bool,
+
+        /// Verify by waiting for a pattern after sending
+        #[arg(long)]
+        wait_for: Option<String>,
+
+        /// Timeout for wait-for verification (seconds)
+        #[arg(long, default_value = "30")]
+        timeout_secs: u64,
+
+        /// Treat wait-for pattern as regex
+        #[arg(long)]
+        wait_for_regex: bool,
+    },
+
+    /// Prepare a workflow action plan preview
+    Workflow {
+        #[command(subcommand)]
+        command: PrepareWorkflowCommands,
+    },
+}
+
+#[derive(Subcommand)]
+enum PrepareWorkflowCommands {
+    /// Prepare a workflow run plan
+    Run {
+        /// Workflow name
+        name: String,
+
+        /// Target pane ID
+        #[arg(long, alias = "pane")]
+        pane_id: u64,
+    },
+}
+
 /// Human CLI rules subcommands
 #[derive(Subcommand)]
 enum RulesCommands {
@@ -2147,6 +2237,23 @@ struct HumanSendData {
     no_newline: bool,
 }
 
+#[derive(Debug, serde::Serialize, serde::Deserialize)]
+#[serde(tag = "type", rename_all = "snake_case")]
+enum PreparedPlanParams {
+    SendText {
+        pane_id: u64,
+        no_paste: bool,
+        no_newline: bool,
+        wait_for: Option<String>,
+        wait_for_regex: bool,
+        timeout_secs: u64,
+    },
+    WorkflowRun {
+        workflow_name: String,
+        pane_id: u64,
+    },
+}
+
 #[derive(Debug, serde::Deserialize)]
 struct IpcPaneState {
     pane_id: u64,
